$schemaNote: Schema keys intentionally unmapped by ai-config-sync. compat scan (upstream-compat.yml) filters ADDED/REMOVED scan against these entries, and surfaces an entry whenever its schema_desc_hash drifts or recheck_after expires — neither is a permanent exclusion.

fieldGuide.reason: One-line why the key is not mapped.
fieldGuide.decided_in: PR or issue reference where the decision was made (e.g. "#5").
fieldGuide.direction: Per-direction action. Values: "drop" (ignore in this sync direction) | "preserve" (keep target's existing value if any, never write) | "bidirectional-equiv:<other_key>" (mark intended future mapping target).
fieldGuide.schema_desc_hash: First 12 hex chars of sha256 over the schema description string. Drift triggers re-review.
fieldGuide.recheck_after: ISO date after which compat scan flags the entry as review-due. Default: Claude +90d, Codex +180d (Claude keys are user-facing toggles with higher impact).

advisorModel.reason: Claude Code client model-selection preference, not the cross-host agent tier mapping; no Codex config equivalent.

agentPushNotifEnabled.reason: Claude Code client notification toggle; no Codex config equivalent.

allowAllClaudeAiMcps.reason: Claude Code client MCP-connector policy toggle, not an MCP server definition; no Codex config equivalent.

autoCompactEnabled.reason: Claude Code client feature toggle; no Codex config equivalent.

autoScrollEnabled.reason: Claude Code TUI display preference; no Codex config equivalent.

awaySummaryEnabled.reason: Claude Code client notification toggle; no Codex config equivalent.

axScreenReader.reason: Claude Code accessibility toggle; no Codex config equivalent.

claudeMd.reason: Claude Code CLAUDE.md loading toggle; host-specific memory-file handling, no Codex config key.

disableAgentView.reason: Claude Code TUI feature toggle; no Codex config equivalent.

disableArtifact.reason: Claude Code client feature toggle; no Codex config equivalent.

disableAutoMode.reason: Claude Code client feature toggle; no Codex config equivalent.

disableBundledSkills.reason: Claude Code client feature toggle; no Codex config equivalent.

disableClaudeAiConnectors.reason: Claude Code client connector policy toggle; no Codex config equivalent.

disableRemoteControl.reason: Claude Code client feature toggle; no Codex config equivalent.

disableWorkflows.reason: Claude Code client feature toggle; no Codex config equivalent.

editorMode.reason: Claude Code TUI editor-mode preference; no Codex config equivalent.

enforceAvailableModels.reason: Claude Code client model-allowlist enforcement toggle; not the cross-host agent tier mapping.

fallbackModel.reason: Claude Code client fallback-model preference; not the cross-host agent tier mapping.

fileCheckpointingEnabled.reason: Claude Code client feature toggle; no Codex config equivalent.

footerLinksRegexes.reason: Claude Code TUI footer-link display config; no Codex config equivalent.

gcpAuthRefresh.reason: Claude Code GCP auth-refresh toggle; no Codex config equivalent.

inputNeededNotifEnabled.reason: Claude Code client notification toggle; no Codex config equivalent.

leftArrowOpensAgents.reason: Claude Code TUI keybinding preference; no Codex config equivalent.

managedMcpServers.reason: Claude Desktop managed MCP-server policy delivery, not user MCP config synced by this tool; no Codex config equivalent.

maxSkillDescriptionChars.reason: Claude Code client skill-listing sizing knob; no Codex config equivalent.

pluginSuggestionMarketplaces.reason: Claude Code client plugin-suggestion source list; no Codex config equivalent.

policyHelper.reason: Claude Code client policy-helper config; no Codex config equivalent.

preferredNotifChannel.reason: Claude Code client notification-channel preference; no Codex config equivalent.

remoteControlAtStartup.reason: Claude Code client feature toggle; no Codex config equivalent.

requiredMaximumVersion.reason: Claude Code client version gate; no Codex config equivalent.

requiredMinimumVersion.reason: Claude Code client version gate; no Codex config equivalent.

respondToBashCommands.reason: Claude Code client feature toggle; no Codex config equivalent.

skillListingBudgetFraction.reason: Claude Code client skill-listing sizing knob; no Codex config equivalent.

sshConfigs.reason: Claude Desktop managed SSH-connection setting; no Codex config equivalent.

sshHostAllowlist.reason: Claude Desktop managed SSH host allowlist; no Codex config equivalent.

syntaxHighlightingDisabled.reason: Claude Code TUI display preference; no Codex config equivalent.

theme.reason: Claude Code TUI color-theme preference; no Codex config equivalent.

verbose.reason: Claude Code TUI verbosity preference; no Codex config equivalent.

voice.reason: Claude Code voice-dictation setting; no Codex config equivalent.

wheelScrollAccelerationEnabled.reason: Claude Code TUI scroll preference; no Codex config equivalent.

workflowKeywordTriggerEnabled.reason: Claude Code client feature toggle; no Codex config equivalent.

apps_mcp_product_sku.reason: Codex Apps MCP host-only product SKU; no Claude equivalent.

desktop.reason: Opaque desktop runtime object (additionalProperties:true); Codex itself does not track its inner shape.

include_collaboration_mode_instructions.reason: Codex-specific developer block injection toggle (renamed from include_apps_instructions); Claude has no equivalent system-prompt toggle.

model_auto_compact_token_limit_scope.reason: Codex auto-compact internal counting mode; Claude auto-compact has no user-facing scope setting.

orchestrator.reason: Codex-internal orchestrator feature settings; nearest Claude concepts (teammateMode, agent-teams env flags) are UI/experimental toggles with different semantics.

AppsDefaultConfig.default_tools_approval.reason: Codex Apps host-only tool approval default; Claude permission mapping has no Apps scope. Same family as apps_mcp_product_sku.

CodeModeConfigToml.direct_only_tool_name.reason: Codex code-mode tool surface control; Claude has no code-mode concept.

CurrentTimeReminderConfigToml.clock_sour.reason: Codex-internal current-time reminder injection; no Claude equivalent.

CurrentTimeReminderConfigToml.delivery_m.reason: Codex time-reminder host feature; same family as CurrentTimeReminderConfigToml.enabled (already allowlisted). No Claude equivalent.

CurrentTimeReminderConfigToml.enabled.reason: Codex-internal current-time reminder injection; no Claude equivalent.

CurrentTimeReminderConfigToml.reminder_i.reason: Codex-internal current-time reminder injection; no Claude equivalent.
Codex time-reminder host feature; same family as CurrentTimeReminderConfigToml.enabled (already allowlisted). No Claude equivalent.

CurrentTimeReminderConfigToml.sleep_tool.reason: Codex time-reminder host feature; same family as CurrentTimeReminderConfigToml.enabled (already allowlisted). No Claude equivalent.

MultiAgentV2ConfigToml.multi_agent_mode_.reason: Codex multi-agent host UI hint text; no Claude equivalent.

OrchestratorFeatureToml.enabled.reason: Codex-internal orchestrator feature toggle; see codex_top_level.orchestrator.

OrchestratorToml.mcp.reason: Codex orchestrator-subsystem feature toggle (bare $ref to OrchestratorFeatureToml {enabled}); unrelated to Claude mcpServers/skills content configs. See codex_top_level.orchestrator.

OrchestratorToml.skills.reason: Codex orchestrator-subsystem feature toggle (bare $ref to OrchestratorFeatureToml {enabled}); unrelated to Claude mcpServers/skills content configs. See codex_top_level.orchestrator.

RawMcpServerConfig.auth.reason: Codex MCP server auth/credentials; ai-config-sync maps MCP tool-approval only, never transport/auth. No cross-host sync.

RolloutBudgetConfigToml.enabled.reason: Codex rollout weighted-token budget; no Claude equivalent.

RolloutBudgetConfigToml.limit_tokens.reason: Codex rollout weighted-token budget; no Claude equivalent.

RolloutBudgetConfigToml.prefill_token_we.reason: Codex rollout weighted-token budget; no Claude equivalent.

RolloutBudgetConfigToml.reminder_at_rema.reason: Codex rollout weighted-token budget; no Claude equivalent.

RolloutBudgetConfigToml.sampling_token_w.reason: Codex rollout weighted-token budget; no Claude equivalent.

TokenBudgetConfigToml.enabled.reason: Codex pre-auto-compaction reminder; nearest Claude controls are env vars (CLAUDE_AUTOCOMPACT_PCT_OVERRIDE, CLAUDE_CODE_AUTO_COMPACT_WINDOW) which are not sync targets.

TokenBudgetConfigToml.guidance_message.reason: Codex token-budget host feature; same family as TokenBudgetConfigToml.enabled (already allowlisted). No Claude equivalent.

TokenBudgetConfigToml.reminder_message_t.reason: Codex pre-auto-compaction reminder; nearest Claude controls are env vars (CLAUDE_AUTOCOMPACT_PCT_OVERRIDE, CLAUDE_CODE_AUTO_COMPACT_WINDOW) which are not sync targets.

TokenBudgetConfigToml.reminder_threshold.reason: Codex pre-auto-compaction reminder; nearest Claude controls are env vars (CLAUDE_AUTOCOMPACT_PCT_OVERRIDE, CLAUDE_CODE_AUTO_COMPACT_WINDOW) which are not sync targets.
